overview: A four-module AI advisor for buying group personalization that combines retrieval-augmented reference answers, diagnostic reasoning across strategic frameworks, guided workflows, and a website experience simulator with decisioning traces.

keyPoints.title: Dual retrieval stores optimize prose vs. tabular data
Empirically calibrated similarity threshold from real queries
Two confidence types surfaced explicitly in reasoning
FLAG/HOLD interrupt system prevents workflow collisions
Architectural correctness doesn't guarantee first-time usability
